name: Simulink
description: MATLAB's graphical model-based design environment for dynamic systems. The standard tool for GNC algorithm development, control system design, and hardware-in-the-loop simulation in aerospace.
whyUseIt: Simulink lets you design, simulate, and auto-generate flight software for guidance and control systems. The same model used for simulation can generate the C code that flies on the vehicle. This model-based design approach reduces errors between design and implementation.
funnelPosition: Control system design and flight software

vocabulary.definition: Design approach where the simulation model IS the specification — code is generated from the model, not written separately
Hardware-in-the-Loop — testing real flight computers against simulated vehicle dynamics

beginnerMistakes: Not testing edge cases and failure modes in simulation
Creating models that are too complex to debug
